settings.deleteWarning: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone. All your tracking data, lists, and reviews will be permanently removed.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Desc: At Neon Hub, we take your privacy seriously. We only collect the minimal information necessary to provide you with our services. This includes:
privacy.s1L1: Account Information: Your username, email address, and an encrypted version of your password.
privacy.s1L2: Profile Data: Your avatar image and optional bio text.
privacy.s1L3: Tracking Data: The media (movies, series, games) you add to your library, your ratings, status, and reviews.
privacy.s1L4: Usage Data: Basic interaction data to help us improve the platform (e.g., login timestamps).
privacy.s2Desc: We use the collected information exclusively to:
privacy.s2L1: Provide, operate, and maintain your personal media tracking library.
privacy.s2L3: Generate aggregate insights (such as your top genres).
privacy.s2L4: Communicate important updates regarding your account or our service.
privacy.s3Desc: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We may share minimal non-identifying data with third-party APIs (like TMDB and RAWG) solely to retrieve accurate media metadata for your library.
privacy.s4Desc: You retain full control over your data. You can delete your account at any time from the Settings page. Executing an account deletion will permanently and irrevocably erase all your personal information, tracking data, reviews, and lists from our servers.
privacy.s5Desc: We implement robust security measures, including bcrypt password hashing, HTTP-only refresh tokens, and SSL encryption, to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Desc: By accessing and using Neon Hub, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use our service.
terms.s2Desc: To use most features of Neon Hub, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account password. You are also responsible for all activities that occur in connection with your account.
terms.s3Desc: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose or in any way that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair our servers or networks. You must not attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the platform.
terms.s4Desc: Neon Hub uses third-party APIs (TMDB and RAWG) for media metadata. We do not claim ownership of these images or metadata. Your personal tracking data remains yours, and we claim no ownership over your reviews or custom lists.
terms.s5Desc: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to our service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.
